---
name: Documentation issue
about: Wrong, stale, missing, or confusing documentation
title: '[Docs] '
labels: ['type:docs', 'needs:triage']
---

## Where

<!-- File path under docs/, or "root README", "skill X", "rule Y". -->

## What's wrong

<!-- Inaccurate? Outdated? Missing? Hard to find? -->

## Suggested fix

<!-- A sketch is fine; you don't need a PR-ready edit. -->

## Context

<!-- "I tried to do X and the docs said Y but the actual behavior was Z" is the most useful framing. -->
